description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From the main trading dashboard, open a single market buy trade on a major forex pair whose base currency is EUR and quote currency is USD, using exactly 0.30 lots with leverage 1:30, and set a stop loss 25 pips below the entry price and a take profit 50 pips above the entry price.
tasks.name: From the main trading dashboard, open a single market buy trade on a major forex pair whose base currency is EUR and quote currency is USD, using exactly 0.30 lots with leverage 1:30, and set a stop loss 25 pips below the entry price and a take profit 50 pips above the entry price.
tasks.description: From the main trading dashboard, open a single market buy trade on a major forex pair whose base currency is EUR and quote currency is USD, using exactly 0.30 lots with leverage 1:30, and set a stop loss 25 pips below the entry price and a take profit 50 pips above the entry price.

tasks.instruction: In the forex majors category, identify the pair with the lowest current spread that is at most 1.5 pips and place a 0.20-lot market order, in either buy or sell direction, on that pair while leaving optional stop loss and take profit fields empty.
tasks.name: In the forex majors category, identify the pair with the lowest current spread that is at most 1.5 pips and place a 0.20-lot market order, in either buy or sell direction, on that pair while leaving optional stop loss and take profit fields empty.
tasks.description: In the forex majors category, identify the pair with the lowest current spread that is at most 1.5 pips and place a 0.20-lot market order, in either buy or sell direction, on that pair while leaving optional stop loss and take profit fields empty.

tasks.instruction: From the indices category, open a single market buy trade on the index CFD that tracks a basket of 100 leading US technology and growth stocks, choosing a contract size such that the required margin shown on the ticket before execution is less than $500.
tasks.name: From the indices category, open a single market buy trade on the index CFD that tracks a basket of 100 leading US technology and growth stocks, choosing a contract size such that the required margin shown on the ticket before execution is less than $500.
tasks.description: From the indices category, open a single market buy trade on the index CFD that tracks a basket of 100 leading US technology and growth stocks, choosing a contract size such that the required margin shown on the ticket before execution is less than $500.

tasks.instruction: Create or update a watchlist named "Active Markets" so that it contains exactly three forex instruments with a positive daily change above 0.50% and two index CFDs with a positive daily change above 1.00%, for a total of five instruments.
tasks.name: Create or update a watchlist named "Active Markets" so that it contains exactly three forex instruments with a positive daily change above 0.50% and two index CFDs with a positive daily change above 1.00%, for a total of five instruments.
tasks.description: Create or update a watchlist named "Active Markets" so that it contains exactly three forex instruments with a positive daily change above 0.50% and two index CFDs with a positive daily change above 1.00%, for a total of five instruments.

tasks.instruction: Using your account history filtered to the last 7 calendar days, find the single day with the highest total realized profit and then add to your favorites list the instrument that generated the largest profit on that specific day.
tasks.name: Using your account history filtered to the last 7 calendar days, find the single day with the highest total realized profit and then add to your favorites list the instrument that generated the largest profit on that specific day.
tasks.description: Using your account history filtered to the last 7 calendar days, find the single day with the highest total realized profit and then add to your favorites list the instrument that generated the largest profit on that specific day.

tasks.instruction: From your open positions, choose any trade currently showing at least $20 of unrealized profit and modify it so that its stop loss equals its entry price and its take profit is moved to a level 50% farther away from the entry price than its previous distance.

target_names: US Tech 100 long on main account

tasks.name: From your open positions, choose any trade currently showing at least $20 of unrealized profit and modify it so that its stop loss equals its entry price and its take profit is moved to a level 50% farther away from the entry price than its previous distance.
tasks.description: From your open positions, choose any trade currently showing at least $20 of unrealized profit and modify it so that its stop loss equals its entry price and its take profit is moved to a level 50% farther away from the entry price than its previous distance.

tasks.instruction: Using the economic calendar, identify the next upcoming high-impact event for USD and then on the most-traded euro–US dollar forex pair create a price alert set 15 pips below the current market price so it will trigger before that event.
tasks.name: Using the economic calendar, identify the next upcoming high-impact event for USD and then on the most-traded euro–US dollar forex pair create a price alert set 15 pips below the current market price so it will trigger before that event.
tasks.description: Using the economic calendar, identify the next upcoming high-impact event for USD and then on the most-traded euro–US dollar forex pair create a price alert set 15 pips below the current market price so it will trigger before that event.

tasks.instruction: From your list of open positions, close every trade whose current unrealized profit/loss is less than -$30, leaving all positions with a loss of -$30 or smaller and all profitable trades still open.

tasks.instruction: On the most liquid euro–US dollar forex pair, place a single OCO order consisting of a 0.10-lot buy stop 20 pips above the current price and a 0.10-lot sell stop 20 pips below the current price, with each leg having a stop loss 15 pips from its entry price and a take profit 40 pips from its entry price.
